summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that the CLI guide's repo-ready but runner-proof-missing onboarding claim is covered by doctor next-action behavior.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the docs/guides/cli.md claim that ready repo setup can still point at runner assessment setup before the first bounded eval loop is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every adapter always needs a runner assessment before eval.
The runner assessment itself has already been created for the tested temp repo.
A live model or product runner was executed.

notableAssertions: doctor returns a ready repo payload for an adapter with an execution surface
doctor --next-action text mode mentions runner assessment
first_bounded_run is present and starts from the scenario catalog before the eval test loop

decision.reason: The focused CLI smoke test runs the doctor command through the public CLI path and verifies the runner-readiness next action plus first_bounded_run guide in the same payload.
